textByHash.00e081ef36a8a88af3933173fc3724bb39bf348f: You will look lovely in that outfit.
textByHash.01447a99bdf0c3ccdec530ee35a81773613dedf8: No more! This is an outrage!
textByHash.1cc5474032020189d81fa4d70866a44c8f5913d9: would cost him money. A beard is the core of a Fremennik's identity, it is the gateway to his soul, it is...
textByHash.2c968b3926a3e755ca1ec2ca972f429b466b02ea: WHAT? This is the last straw. My father wore a beard, my father's father wore a beard; many generations of Fremennik have worn beards with pride, without having to worry whether his pride and joy
textByHash.4917df870e90a085be7165094da965196eceb2fc: That's not right. I'm not paying you that much!
textByHash.752e7a079bce784be178a5412edba1384da25063: [sigh] It seems a lot of money for some windows.
textByHash.7b3af601aef35168bb35589687f9ce34873fd2e3: But we only paid our Island Tax last week!
textByHash.8a1b132a136d1ddb6381bfc95b060fc0e8c0cd76: Oh, hello again. Want to buy some weapons?
textByHash.a6d569907e15fe59dbb88219d9b1208b91426f22: You should speak with the ruler of this isle, King Gjuki Sorvott IV.
textByHash.aa5bce8d27877a02c4cf9d58799f28f86f00fd14: You look lovely in that outfit.
textByHash.c28db2f97012ad9aa499062501c8cea3107edb7b: What? Can't you count? I'm not paying my tax to someone who can't count.
textByHash.c36ddfb30cfa5dde512ed79abd7565810a8e9711: Oh, thanks a lot 'friend'. What is it this time?
textByHash.dd241fadb13f9f3ccf23fb54523268ea556e18a5: Is there anything else I can help you with?
